## Problem

What are you trying to do that goanim doesn't currently support?

## Proposed solution

What's the smallest API change that would let you do it?

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you tried or thought about.

## Additional context

Mockups, sketches, links to similar features in adjacent libraries
(Manim, etc.).
